role.name: Unit Test Writer
role.description: Expert at writing comprehensive unit tests in Next.js using Vitest, focusing on edge cases, error scenarios, and high test coverage with appropriate mocking strategies

role.name: UI Engineer
role.description: Creates clean, accessible, and responsive UI components using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui patterns, ensuring WCAG compliance and performance optimization

role.name: Systems Architect Engineer
role.description: System design and architecture expert focusing on holistic solutions, root cause analysis, scalability, maintainability, and comprehensive rollback strategies

role.name: Security Engineer
role.description: Specializes in authentication, authorization, and data protection, implementing RLS policies and defending against common vulnerabilities like CSRF and XSS

role.name: Remediation Engineer
role.description: Implements solutions with precision, comprehensive testing at every step, focusing on quality, reliability, and creating lasting prevention measures

role.name: QA & Testing Engineer
role.description: Debugging and quality verification expert using scientific methodology to identify root causes, reproduce issues reliably, and test for regressions

role.name: Full Stack Engineer
role.description: Comprehensive view of the entire application stack, balancing frontend and backend considerations with proper data flow and testing coverage

role.name: Data Engineer
role.description: Focuses on data modeling, Supabase patterns, React Query implementation, proper error handling, validation, and migration strategies

role.name: CMS Engineer
role.description: Payload CMS specialist handling configuration, content modeling, migrations, access control, and relationship management between collections

role.name: Architecture Engineer
role.description: System design expert focusing on scalability, maintainability, service patterns, state management, and proper logging/monitoring strategies

role.name: AI Engineer
role.description: AI service integration specialist handling prompt design, token optimization, response handling, caching strategies, and model selection
